notes: Datadog monitor-alert notifications. Serialize an example's `blocks` array into an action's `text` field. Canonical alert card = header (🔴 [Triggered] <monitor>) + section(fields) for Monitor/Status/Metric/Threshold/Value + an optional correlated-metric section + a context footer with Monitor #, priority, env/cloud tags, timestamp. Pair the Triggered card with a Recovered card (✅ [Recovered] …) carrying the recovered value + time-to-recover. Fits SRE/ops/observability channels.

examples.name: monitor_triggered
examples.when: A metric monitor breaches threshold (latency/error rate/throughput) and alerts an ops channel.

text.text: 🔴 [Triggered] MSPF — API p99 Latency & Error Rate High
Also firing: *aws.kinesis.put_records.throttled_records{stream:mspf-telemetry-ingest}* — write throughput exceeded; consumer Lambda showing elevated throttles. Scope: *us-east-1* only.

elements.text: Monitor #4471288 · Priority P2 · env:prod · cloud:aws · 2026-07-15 14:32 ET · @here

examples.name: monitor_recovered
examples.when: The monitor returns to OK; posts the recovered values and time-to-recover.

text.text: ✅ [Recovered] MSPF — API p99 Latency & Error Rate High

elements.text: Monitor #4471288 · Recovered 2026-07-15 14:59 ET · triggered 14:32 ET · env:prod · cloud:aws
